title: marinednadude/Pycno_nad5_v1_qPCR_Protocol_BeBOP: V1.0.1
author: Zachary Gold
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document describes the required protocol to conduct a Quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (qPCR) assay to detect and quantify double-stranded DNA of the NADH dehydrogenase 5 (nad5) gene from the sunflower star (Pycnopodia helianthoides) with an Internal Positive Control (IPC).
steps_raw: This document describes the required protocol to conduct a Quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (qPCR) assay to detect and quantify double-stranded DNA of the NADH dehydrogenase 5 (nad5) gene from the sunflower star (Pycnopodia helianthoides) with an Internal Positive Control (IPC).
